title: Farm Table — Normalized Task Interface Schema (DRAFT)
description: Draft JSON Schema for the Farm Table universal task interface. Defines the Normalized Task Object (NTO) and all supporting entities derived from initial research.

TaskStatus.description: Normalized task lifecycle state. Maps platform-native statuses into four canonical categories: OPEN (Backlog, Todo, New), IN_PROGRESS (Active, Working, In Development, QA, Review), ON_HOLD (Blocked, Paused, Deferred, Pending Feedback), CLOSED (Done, Completed, Fixed, Resolved, Won't Fix).

TaskPriority.description: Normalized urgency level for task prioritization.

UserType.description: Classification of an actor in the system.

IdentityStatus.description: Lifecycle state for a user or service account identity.

AuthMethod.description: Authentication method used for a linked platform account.

CustomFieldType.description: Data type of a custom field value.

User.description: A human, agent, or service account that can be assigned tasks or author changes.

id.description: Stable Farm Table identifier for this user.

remote_id.description: The user's identifier in the source platform.

Relationship.description: A directed semantic relationship between two tasks.

target_task_id.description: Farm Table ID of the related task.

CustomFieldValue.description: A value for a platform-specific or organization-defined custom field. Preserves non-standard metadata that does not map to NTO built-in fields.

value.description: The field value. Type varies based on field_type.

Attachment.description: A file attached to a task or comment.

Comment.description: A message in the conversation thread of a task. Body is normalized to Markdown regardless of source platform format.

remote_id.description: Comment identifier in the source platform.

Change.description: A field-level diff recording how a task was modified. Forms a tamper-proof audit trail of all agent and human actions.

field.description: Name of the field that changed (e.g., 'status', 'assignees', 'priority').

reason.description: Optional explanation for the change, supporting the 'auditable by construction' principle.

StatusMapping.description: Maps a platform-native status label to a Farm Table normalized status category.

native_status.description: The status label as it appears in the source platform.

LinkedAccount.description: A connection between a Farm Table identity and a platform account. Manages authentication tokens and scope grants under least-privilege.

user_id.description: The Farm Table user this account belongs to.

scopes.description: Granted permission scopes (least-privilege set for current work).

remote_user_id.description: User identifier in the source platform.

Collection.description: A grouping of tasks representing a project, board, or repository. Defines the operational boundary for agent work and scopes task queries.

id.description: Stable Farm Table identifier for this collection.

remote_id.description: Identifier in the source platform (e.g., repo full name, project key, team ID).

workspace_id.description: Platform workspace or organization identifier, if applicable.

status_mappings.description: Per-collection mapping of native statuses to normalized states. Supports custom workflows (e.g., Jira's configurable status schemes).

custom_field_definitions.description: Custom fields available in this collection, discovered via platform API (e.g., Jira /createmeta).

remote_data.description: Raw platform-specific metadata for this collection.

Task.description: The Normalized Task Object (NTO) — the central entity of Farm Table. Encapsulates all information an agent needs to understand and execute a piece of work, regardless of source platform.

id.description: Stable Farm Table identifier. Globally unique across all platforms.

name.description: Title or summary of the task.

description.description: Detailed work instructions, normalized to Markdown.

native_status.description: The original status label from the source platform, preserved for round-trip fidelity.

assignees.description: Agents and/or humans assigned to this task.

creator.description: The user who created the task.

collection_id.description: The collection (project/board/repo) this task belongs to.

parent_task_id.description: Reference to a higher-level task in the hierarchy (supports up to 8 levels per GitHub sub-issues).

relationships.description: Dependency and semantic links to other tasks (blocks, blocked_by, related, duplicate).

labels.description: Tags or labels applied to the task.

custom_fields.description: Organization-defined custom field values. Preserves platform-specific metadata via declarative mapping.

remote_id.description: Identifier in the source platform (e.g., GitHub issue number, Jira key PROJ-123, Linear UUID).

remote_url.description: Web URL to the task in the source platform.

remote_data.description: Raw, un-transformed payload from the source platform. Escape hatch for fields that do not map to the NTO.

WebhookEvent.description: A normalized event emitted when a task changes in any connected platform. Supports both native webhooks and virtual webhooks (poll-derived) for platforms without webhook support.

changes.description: Field-level diffs included with this event.

source.description: Whether this event came from a platform webhook or was synthesized by polling.

description: Root schema object. A Farm Table document may contain any combination of the defined entities.
